subject: fix(pwa): restore purple status bar color
body:
The meta theme-color was changed from brand purple (#7c3aed) to white
(#FAFAFA) during the dark mode sync work. This restores the original
purple PWA status bar that colors the time/battery/wifi area.

Light: #7c3aed (violet-600), Dark: #2e1065 (violet-950).

Tags: pwa, theme, ui
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_017yi6hBwtrYfut3bcT4kkjM
title: restore purple status bar color
